title: 有馬記念の後に・迷走の始まり

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka loses to Daiwa Scarlet. What's more, she
claims that, having no sound goals, she deserved
the loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling that she cannot continue to race the way
she has been, Vodka decides that she needs to be
more clear about the type of coolness she is truly
searching for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recommend the Victoria Mile for her next race,
where she can sprint full speed ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka decides to spend the time before the race
trying to figure out what she really wants to strive
for.
